title: vaccinium sanguineum
intro: Vaccinium sanguineum, also known as the bloody craneberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vaccinium sanguineum include the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, urinary tract infections, and skin problems due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Vaccinium sanguineum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
